resources.string: Get your free API key at pastebin.com/doc_api\nThen paste it below:
Project name. Long press to copy project folder path.
Gradle layout (like IntelliJ): build.gradle, src/main/java with package path, src/test/java.\nRoot: app storage Documents/JavaDroid/.
Pure bytecode project — write .asm files, compile to .class, and run.\nNo Maven, no pom.xml. Just bytecode.\nRoot: app storage Documents/JavaDroid/.
Maven layout (like IntelliJ): src/main/java with package path, main/resources, test/java, test/resources.\nRoot: app storage Documents/JavaDroid/.
File copied. Long-press a folder to paste.
Open a .java file to view JVM bytecode (ASM / javap-style).
Select a method on the left
Affects ECJ compilation. Higher targets may not run via D8 desugaring.
All UI, font and compiler preferences will be reset. Project files are kept.
Only .java import is supported in the project
This project is not a git repository yet.\n%1$s
Clones a repository and replaces the contents of this folder.
e.g. Fix null pointer in MainActivity
Initialise a Git repository in this project first?
Commit message must not be empty
For GitHub: use a Personal Access Token (Settings → Developer settings → Tokens). Stored locally with simple obfuscation.
Do you want to add %1$s:%2$s:%3$s to pom.xml?

Running and compiling Kotlin files (.kt) directly on-device is not supported due to resource constraints. \n\nPlease use syntax highlighting for code editing, and perform compilation on an external server or PC.
This file format is not supported
Set your Gemini API key in Settings
Get your free API key at aistudio.google.com
Paste your API key from aistudio.google.com
Are you sure you want to permanently delete %1$s and all its files? This action cannot be undone.
Clone any Git repository from GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, or any URL.
Remove the C++ NDK to free up space?
This will download ~130MB (extracts to ~500MB) of Clang/LLVM toolchain for full C++ support. Proceed?
No watch expressions.\nTap \'+ Add Watch\' to add one.
Only Markdown files (.md) can be previewed
Only JSON and XML files can be formatted
Warning: built-in C compiler not available, skipping native compilation
Warning: C++ sources require external NDK. Skipping.
❌ Native Build Error:\nBuilt-in C compiler is not available on this device.

❌ C++ Build Error:
C++ sources (.cpp) require the external NDK.

Please go to Settings → Install C++ NDK to download the toolchain (~130MB).
Or rewrite your JNI code in pure C (.c) to use the built-in fast compiler.
❌ C++ Build Error:\nFailed to execute clang++ for %1$s: %2$s
Auto: reduces features when battery is low. Performance: enables all features always.
Search automatically as you type in project files
Catch without handling — error may be lost
SQL via string concatenation — possible SQL injection!
ExecutorService without shutdown — possible thread leak
Dereference after null check — possible NPE
Returning null — consider Optional or Collections.empty*
Indexed for on List — for-each or stream()
Diamond operator <> — remove types on right
Switch with String — consider enum or Map
Test without assert — check does nothing
Thread.sleep in test — unreliable, use Awaitility
addAll after creation — pass elements in constructor
Creating and filling — List.of() or Arrays.asList()
Wildcard <? extends T> in return — PECS
Stream without terminal operation — does nothing
return in forEach lambda doesn\'t exit method
Multiple suppressions — code may need refactoring
Enum with %1$d constants — consider Strategy pattern
ordinal() — unreliable, use name() or custom field
HashMap with enum keys — EnumMap more efficient
switch without default — new enum constants won\'t be handled
Boolean parameter — consider Builder or two methods
Triple line duplication — extract to method
Constants should be before regular fields
Field \'%1$s\' used in one place — local variable?
Switch with %1$d cases — consider polymorphism or Map
Pattern.compile() in loop — compile in advance
Enum with %1$d constants — consider Strategy pattern
ordinal() — unreliable, use name() or custom field
HashMap with enum keys — EnumMap more efficient
Method \'%1$s\' used 1 time and short — inline
To work with project files, the app needs access to the file system.\n\nPlease enable \"Access to all files\" on the next screen.
Without file access, the app cannot work with projects.
No profiling data. Run code with profiler enabled.
AI agent can edit files without confirmation
